name: substrate
description: Scaffold full-stack Vite + Convex + Clerk apps from concept to production in 15 minutes. Fourteen skills cover the full pipeline — init, adopt, migrate, architect-spec, graph-spec, execute, orchestrate, dispatch, quick-spec, diagnose, synthesize-session, spool, add-doctrine, deploy — grounded in Domain-Driven Design, railway-oriented programming, a testing pyramid, and a Gemini AI Studio Build handoff.
